negative_cases.why_wrong: Current Contribution Conductance: forces the main output to zero, so coarse compilation passes but behavioral stimulus points fail.
Current Contribution Conductance: uses a shifted or inverted decision condition that can pass one mode but fails boundary cases.
Current Contribution Conductance: mishandles reset or initialization, passing steady-state samples but failing startup or recovery checks.
Current Contribution Conductance: keeps the main datapath plausible while reporting the wrong metric value.
